topic: A Sanad office in Muscat moved 40 client work permits off WhatsApp — no missed renewals in six months
format: Open with a SmartPRO Hub product capability, then show the real-world business outcome it enables
post:
40 client work permits. 7 WhatsApp groups. One Sanad office in Muscat trying to hold it all together through threads, manual reminders, and hope.

That's not a workflow. That's a compliance incident waiting to be filed.

Six months after moving to SmartPRO Hub: zero missed renewals. All 40 permits in one dashboard. Automated deadline alerts. A client portal that updates stakeholders without anyone having to chase anyone down.

No spreadsheets. No group chats. No follow-up calls.

Here's the thing about WhatsApp — it works at 5 clients. At 25, it starts failing quietly. A message gets buried. A reminder doesn't land. And you don't always know something went wrong until the client is already wondering whether you're actually on top of their file. By then, the renewal isn't the only thing at risk.

Sanad offices were growing their client lists faster than their systems could keep up. That's a good problem, until it isn't. SmartPRO Hub was built specifically for that gap — permit tracking, renewal timelines, and client communication in one place. When everything lives in the same system, things stop falling through the cracks because there are no cracks to fall through.

If you're still running this through messages, the exposure is real. It's just easy to miss until you can't anymore.

How are you currently tracking renewal deadlines across multiple clients?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
